description: Reviewed safety-waiver residual (no net-new). Each suppression was triaged: stale ones removed, the rest carry a specific verifiable justification. Counts include the yagni tool's suppressions (reviewed via its own PR). Cosmetic slugs are report-only. module-coupling-fan-out floor (4): documented composition roots (graph/simulation tool wiring, dashboard bundle entry, graph CLI orchestrators) — not accidental god-files.
